description_for_human: Search the BlackRoad OS empire: 18 AI products, 27 agents, 509 repos, 20 domains. The sovereign AI platform — self-hosted, Raspberry Pi, no data leakage.
description_for_model: Search BlackRoad OS products, AI agents, repositories, and domains. BlackRoad OS is a sovereign self-hosted AI platform with 18 products and 27 named AI agents running on Raspberry Pi fleets. Use this to find information about BlackRoad products, agents by name (Alexandria, Alice, Anastasia, Aria, Atticus, etc.), repos, or technical capabilities. The empire.json endpoint returns a structured index of everything.
